{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 2,
    "R1.6": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent's method for verbal confidence tokens is not clearly linked to the stated goal of deployment-time verbal labels.",
    "R1.6": "The prose-level edits suggested improvements, but the core claim and framing remain unclear.",
    "RX.1": "The artifact does not reconcile the two descriptions of the supervision target (TD error history vs. running standard deviation of bootstrapped value estimates).",
    "RX.3": "The goal statement commits to a stochastic-dominance-like property between label-conditioned return distributions, but this is not argued.",
    "RX.4": "The artifact assumes TD error magnitude as a reliable proxy for predictive uncertainty about returns without citing support or flagging it as a modeling choice.",
    "RX.5": "Several specifics appear without source or justification and cannot be verified from the text alone."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent's method for verbal confidence tokens is not clearly linked to the stated goal of deployment-time verbal labels.
rationale.R1.6: The prose-level edits suggested improvements, but the core claim and framing remain unclear.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact does not reconcile the two descriptions of the supervision target (TD error history vs. running standard deviation of bootstrapped value estimates).
rationale.RX.3: The goal statement commits to a stochastic-dominance-like property between label-conditioned return distributions, but this is not argued.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact assumes TD error magnitude as a reliable proxy for predictive uncertainty about returns without citing support or flagging it as a modeling choice.
rationale.RX.5: Several specifics appear without source or justification and cannot be verified from the text alone.
